title: Short title
doc_html:
SUBPART K. ALLEN TOUSSAINT LEGACY ACT

§470.1. Short title

            This Subpart shall be known and may be cited as the "Allen Toussaint Legacy Act".

            Acts 2022, No. 425, §1.

SUBPART K. ALLEN TOUSSAINT LEGACY ACT
§470.1.  Short title
This Subpart shall be known and may be cited as the "Allen Toussaint Legacy Act".
Acts 2022, No. 425, §1.
